mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sport_record (user_id, sport_type, steps, distance_km, duration_min, pace, calories_burned, source_type, external_id, record_date) VALUES (#{userId}, #{sportType}, #{steps}, #{distanceKm}, #{durationMin}, #{pace}, #{caloriesBurned}, #{sourceType}, #{externalId}, #{recordDate})
mapper.update: UPDATE sport_record SET sport_type = #{sportType}, steps = #{steps}, distance_km = #{distanceKm}, duration_min = #{durationMin}, pace = #{pace}, calories_burned = #{caloriesBurned}, source_type = #{sourceType}, external_id = #{externalId}, record_date = #{recordDate} WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM sport_record WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, sport_type, steps, distance_km, duration_min, pace, calories_burned, source_type, external_id, record_date, created_at, updated_at FROM sport_record WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sport_sync_log (user_id, source_type, total_count, inserted_count, duplicate_count, status, message) VALUES (#{userId}, #{sourceType}, #{totalCount}, #{insertedCount}, #{duplicateCount}, #{status}, #{message})
